title: lotus corniculatus var. schoelleri
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. schoelleri, also known as common bird's-foot trefoil or sweet pea trefoil, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of lotus corniculatus var. schoelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate menopausal symptoms, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Lotus corniculatus var. schoelleri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a food supplement or added to food products due to its nutty flavor and potential health benefits.
